title: Arrays
description: Contiguous memory, O(1) random access, dynamic resizing, and common array operations.

title: Linked Lists
description: Node-pointer chains, O(1) insert/delete at head, traversal, and pointer manipulation.

title: Stack
description: LIFO data structure with O(1) push, pop, and peek operations.

title: Queue
description: FIFO data structure with O(1) enqueue and dequeue operations.

title: Hash Table
description: Key-value storage with O(1) average lookup, insertion, and deletion using hash functions.

title: Binary Search Tree
description: Hierarchical structure enabling O(log n) search, insert, and delete with ordered traversals.

title: Heap
description: Complete binary tree maintaining heap property. Supports O(log n) insert and extract-max/min.

title: Bubble Sort
description: Simple comparison sort that repeatedly swaps adjacent elements. O(n²) average.

title: Selection Sort
description: Finds the minimum element and places it at the beginning. O(n²) in all cases.

title: Insertion Sort
description: Builds sorted array one element at a time by inserting into correct position. O(n²) average.

title: Merge Sort
description: Divide-and-conquer sort with guaranteed O(n log n) time. Stable and predictable.

title: Quick Sort
description: Efficient in-place sort using pivot partitioning. O(n log n) average, O(n²) worst.

title: Binary Search
description: Efficient O(log n) search on sorted arrays by repeatedly halving the search space.

title: BFS (Breadth-First)
description: Level-by-level graph traversal using a queue. Finds shortest unweighted paths.

title: DFS (Depth-First)
description: Explores graph branches as deep as possible using a stack or recursion.

title: Two Pointers
description: Efficient pattern using two indices to scan arrays from both ends or at different speeds.

title: Sliding Window
description: Maintains a window over a contiguous subarray to solve range-based problems efficiently.

title: Dynamic Programming
description: Solves complex problems by breaking them into overlapping subproblems with memoization.

title: Recursion
description: Function calling itself to solve problems. Visualize call stacks and memoization.

title: Prefix Sum
description: Precompute cumulative sums to answer range-sum queries in O(1).
